description: gRPC network layer for OpenRaft RPC communication between nodes

protobuf_schema.name: Protocol Buffers Schema
protobuf_schema.description: Define protobuf messages for Raft RPC

server_implementation.name: gRPC Server Implementation
server_implementation.description: Implement gRPC service for receiving Raft RPC messages
success_criteria: Vote request handler returns vote response

client_implementation.name: gRPC Client Implementation
client_implementation.description: Implement client for sending Raft RPC to peers
success_criteria: Client can connect to all peer nodes

raft_network_trait.name: RaftNetwork Integration
raft_network_trait.description: Implement openraft::RaftNetwork trait to replace StubNetwork

define_raft_proto.name: Define Raft protobuf schema
define_raft_proto.description: Create raft.proto with all Raft RPC message types
acceptance_criteria: message VoteRequest { uint64 node_id = 1; uint64 term = 2; uint64 last_log_index = 3; uint64 last_log_term = 4; }
message VoteResponse { uint64 node_id = 1; uint64 term = 2; bool vote_granted = 3; }
message AppendEntriesRequest { uint64 node_id = 1; uint64 term = 2; uint64 prev_log_index = 3; uint64 prev_log_term = 4; uint64 commit_index = 5; repeated Entry entries = 6; }
message AppendEntriesResponse { uint64 node_id = 1; uint64 term = 2; bool success = 3; }
message InstallSnapshotRequest { uint64 node_id = 1; uint64 term = 2; uint64 last_included_index = 3; uint64 last_included_term = 4; bytes data = 5; }
message InstallSnapshotResponse { uint64 node_id = 1; uint64 term = 2; bool success = 3; }

generate_rust_types.name: Generate Rust types from proto
generate_rust_types.description: Use tonic-build to generate Rust types from raft.proto

test_serialization.name: Test proto serialization
test_serialization.description: Write tests for proto message serialization/deserialization

implement_raft_service.name: Implement Raft gRPC service
implement_raft_service.description: Create RaftService that implements the generated gRPC service trait
acceptance_criteria: vote handler accepts VoteRequest, returns VoteResponse
append_entries handler accepts request, returns response

handle_vote_request.name: Implement vote request handler
handle_vote_request.description: Handle incoming vote requests and return vote responses
acceptance_criteria: Returns vote_granted if candidate log is up-to-date
Updates term if higher than local

handle_append_entries.name: Implement append entries handler
acceptance_criteria: Updates commit index if majority acknowledged

handle_install_snapshot.name: Implement install snapshot handler
handle_install_snapshot.description: Handle incoming install snapshot requests for log compaction
acceptance_criteria: Updates log to include snapshot metadata

connection_lifecycle.name: Manage connection lifecycle
connection_lifecycle.description: Handle server start/stop and graceful shutdown

implement_grpc_client.name: Implement gRPC client wrapper
implement_grpc_client.description: Create GrpcClient wrapper around generated client
acceptance_criteria: Can connect to server at address

connection_pool.name: Implement connection pool
connection_pool.description: Maintain pool of connections to peer nodes

retry_logic.name: Implement retry with backoff
retry_logic.description: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for failed requests
acceptance_criteria: Returns error after all retries exhausted

timeout_handling.name: Implement timeout handling
timeout_handling.description: Add request timeouts per RPC type

implement_raft_network_trait.name: Implement RaftNetwork trait
acceptance_criteria: Returns Result with proper error types

replace_stub_network.name: Replace StubNetwork
replace_stub_network.description: Replace existing StubNetwork implementation with gRPC version

integration_tests.name: Integration tests
acceptance_criteria: No message loss under normal conditions
